description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gitlab/dind:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service. Define two stages: build and test, and add a before_script that runs 'cd devenv' for all jobs. In the build stage add an event-store-prepare job that executes 'docker-compose build' then 'docker-compose run -u $UID:$GROUPS --rm event-store-prepare' and publishes the 'build/' directory as an artifact. In the test stage add an event-store-test job that depends on event-store-prepare and runs 'docker-compose run -u $UID:$GROUPS --rm event-store-test'.
